data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Utilize a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Implement containerization with Docker or Kubernetes to manage service interactions.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Replace traditional servers with serverless options for cost efficiency and automatic scaling.
data.technical_spec: Use AWS Lambda or Azure Functions to deploy serverless components.

data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: Design systems for redundancy and fault tolerance across distributed networks.
data.technical_spec: Adopt patterns like CQRS and Event Sourcing to ensure resilience.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Utilize load balancing to distribute traffic evenly and ensure maximal uptime.
data.technical_spec: Integrate reverse proxies like Nginx or HAProxy for effective load distribution.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Implement an API Gateway to manage and route client requests to services.
data.technical_spec: Use solutions such as Kong or AWS API Gateway for managing APIs.
